About

I'm an IT professional working in endpoint management and automation. My work spans endpoint management with Microsoft Intune, Power Platform development, and infrastructure documentation.

I'm working toward a career in offensive security — currently on the OSCP track, studying for Network+ and Security+, and doing pentesting practice on TryHackMe. I run a security-focused home lab for practical, hands on, self driven labs.

This site is where I log the journey — lab writeups, cert notes, things I've built, and problems I've worked through.

Currently

Pursuing Network+ and Security+. Building internal tooling on the Power Platform. Learning what I can, where I can.

Stack

Microsoft Intune · PowerShell · Power Apps · Power Automate · Dataverse · Kali Linux · OPNsense · Python · Bash
